mapper.sql: select w.work_order_id, w.work_order_code, w.work_order_name, w.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, w.mbom_id, b.mbom_code, w.routing_id, r.routing_code, w.resource_id, res.resource_code, res.resource_name, w.plan_qty, w.completed_qty, w.unit, w.priority, w.source_order_code, w.plan_start_date, w.plan_end_date, w.actual_start_time, w.actual_end_time, w.status, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.remark from mom_work_order w left join ( select material_id product_id, material_code product_code, material_name product_name from mom_material where (material_type = 'product' or category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) ) p on w.product_id = p.product_id left join mom_mbom b on w.mbom_id = b.mbom_id left join mom_routing r on w.routing_id = r.routing_id left join mom_resource res on w.resource_id = res.resource_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_work_order where work_order_code = #{workOrderCode} and work_order_id != #{workOrderId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_work_order(work_order_code, work_order_name, product_id, mbom_id, routing_id, resource_id, plan_qty, completed_qty, unit, priority, source_order_code, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{workOrderCode}, #{workOrderName}, #{productId}, #{mbomId}, #{routingId}, #{resourceId}, #{planQty}, #{completedQty}, #{unit}, #{priority}, #{sourceOrderCode}, #{planStartDate}, #{planEndDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_work_order where work_order_id in #{workOrderId}
mapper.update: update mom_work_order set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
update mom_work_order set status = 'running', actual_start_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where work_order_id = #{workOrderId}

update mom_work_order set status = 'finished', completed_qty = #{completedQty}, actual_end_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
